channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Man charged with assaulting federal officers after allegedly biting ICE agents at Newark protest
item.description: A New Jersey man faces federal charges for allegedly biting two ICE officers during an anti-ICE protest in Newark.

item.title: Former Biden aide warns Democratic party backing Platner amid scandal is a dangerous game
item.description: Michael LaRosa expressed shock at Democratic support for Graham Platner, calling the Maine Senate candidate unfit to challenge Susan Collins.

item.title: Feel-Good Friday: Young man graduates high school and completes boot camp, marches in Marine uniform
Trump endorses Evette over Mace for South Carolina governor
item.description: President Donald Trump endorsed Lt. Gov. Pamela Evette in South Carolina's Republican gubernatorial primary on Friday.
